title: Last-Second Touchdown Stop
description: Carrier is airborne or running directly into goal. Defender lands a hit just before the scoring condition triggers. Score must be deniable if hit precedes goal.

expected_outcomes.description: No goal registered; ball becomes loose or possession transfers.

must_not_outcomes.description: Carrier within goal proximity becomes invulnerable — hit has no effect on scoring.

notes: Related to S-001 but specifically tests the airborne + last-frame case. Timing resolution must be deterministic.
